name: @metorial/hightouch
description: Manage reverse ETL pipelines that sync data from warehouses to 200+ SaaS destinations. Create and configure sources, destinations, models, and syncs. Trigger syncs and sync sequences on demand, monitor sync run history with status and error details, and serve low-latency personalization data via collection queries. Supports field mappings, sync modes (upsert, insert, update, mirror), and integration with orchestration tools.
